# OpenAPI fixture sources

This directory stores example OpenAPI specs used by tests.

## Source URLs

- `stripe-spec3.yaml`: <https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stripe/openapi/master/openapi/spec3.yaml>
- `github-rest-3.1.yaml`: <https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/rest-api-description/main/descriptions-next/api.github.com/api.github.com.yaml>
- `openai.yaml`: <https://app.stainless.com/api/spec/documented/openai/openapi.documented.yml>
- `cloudflare.yaml`: <https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cloudflare/api-schemas/main/openapi.yaml>
- `twilio-api-v2010.yaml`: <https://raw.githubusercontent.com/twilio/twilio-oai/main/spec/yaml/twilio_api_v2010.yaml>
- `digitalocean-v2.yaml`: <https://raw.githubusercontent.com/digitalocean/openapi/main/specification/DigitalOcean-public.v2.yaml>
- `kubernetes-api-v1-openapi.json`: <https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/master/api/openapi-spec/v3/api__v1_openapi.json>
- `petstore-v3.0-oai.yaml`: <https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OAI/OpenAPI-Specification/main/_archive_/schemas/v3.0/pass/petstore.yaml>
- `shopify-openapi.yaml`: <https://raw.githubusercontent.com/allengrant/shopify_openapi/master/shopify_openapi.yaml>
- `supabase-auth-v1-openapi.json`: <https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supabase/supabase/master/apps/docs/spec/auth_v1_openapi.json>

## Pre-existing fixture

- `petstore.yaml`: present in this repository before these downloads; source URL not changed here.
